word: G475 - ἀντιδιατίθεμαι - antidiatíthemai - an-tee-dee-at-eeth'-em-ahee - That oppose themselves

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That oppose themselves
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to place oneself in opposition, to oppose
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G473 and G1303; to set oneself opposite, that is, be disputatious: - that oppose themselves.
